data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for anonymous bidding.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Anonymous bidding (don't see others' bids)', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions anonymous bidding, yet no API reads or persisted state checks are included to demonstrate that this functionality is enforced in the system. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of anonymous bidding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check for anonymous bidding
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract to confirm that bids are not visible to other users.
